title: Ability to notify Slack channel when status of Subitem changes
excerpt: Exactly as it says — I’m looking for the ability to notify a Slack channel when the status of a Subitem changes. This same automation currently works at a Task level, but not at the Subitem level. Seems like a basic use …

posts.author: JohnSchnett (John Schnettgoecke)
posts.cookedHtml: Exactly as it says — I’m looking for the ability to notify a Slack channel when the status of a Subitem changes. This same automation currently works at a Task level, but not at the Subitem level. Seems like a basic use case that a lot of people (including myself) would find useful.

posts.author: jprakash (Jay Prakash)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JohnSchnett
We’ve recently launched an app called Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com that let’s you notify a Slack channel when the status of subitem changes (and so much more)!

Screenshot 2024-03-12 at 13.31.24697×284 11.2 KB

Kindly give it a try. It’s free for a full 14-day trial. Should you have any issues, kindly let us know!
